title: Discounted Heating Fuel - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Utility Assistance > Discounted Heating Fuel 4 Matching Service Providers The mapped locations are estimates, for the exact location of an individual site, select "More Details" Accessibility Options - Select - No Filter Wheelchair Access (Full) Wheelchair Access (Partial) Accessible Parking (Private Lot) Accessible Parking (Nearby Public/Street Parking) Accessible Restrooms Alternative Communication Formats Virtual Service Options Staff Trained in Disability Awareness Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF GLIDE SEVENTH DAY ADVENTIST CHURCH HELPING HANDS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides food, clothing, and firewood. Always accepts donations. 174 Abbott Street Glide, OR 974430079 Eligibility: Must meet USDA income guidelines Hours: Wednesday 10am-2pm Email (541) 496-3956 Get Directions Visit Website More Details LANE COUNTY HUMAN SERVICE DIVISION LIHEAP WAITLIST Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Lane County Low-Income Home Energy Assistance Program (LIHEAP) waitlist access point for winter warming and summer cooling, which includes electrical, natural gas, and heating fuel until capacity is reached. 151 W 7th Avenue Eugene, OR 97401 Eligibility: Most utility assistance programs: 60% of Area Median Income Hours: Monday-Thursday 8am-5pm Email (541) 682-3378 Get Directions Visit Website More Details MARY'S RIVER GLEANERS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Members glean food from fields and orchards and collect both food and non-food items donated by stores and markets. The food is distributed weekly through the participating efforts of its members. Incontinence supplies are available. Firewood for heating fuel is often available. Accepting donations of hygiene products such as toothbrushes, toothpaste, shampoo, conditioner, soap, and body wash. 1300 Philomath Boulevard Corvallis, OR 97333 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Distribution: Saturday 11:30am-2pm. Gleaning hours vary. (541) 497-9019 Get Directions Visit Website More Details NEIGHBORS TOGETHER OF UNION COUNTY NEIGHBORS TOGETHER WOODLOT EMERGENCY WOOD LOT Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides up to one cord of firewood. Assistance is granted only once per season and is on a first come, first serve basis. 3304 Alder Street La Grande, OR 97850 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: By appointment only Email (541) 963-9126 Get Directions Visit Website More Details GLIDE SEVENTH DAY ADVENTIST CHURCH HELPING HANDS LANE COUNTY HUMAN SERVICE DIVISION LIHEAP WAITLIST MARY'S RIVER GLEANERS MARY'S RIVER GLEANERS NEIGHBORS TOGETHER OF UNION COUNTY EMERGENCY WOOD LOT
